/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_model.so -o librobot_model.so CMakeFiles/robot_model.dir/src/robot_model.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/ryml/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: /home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/install/ryml/lib/libryml.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libament_index_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpinocchio.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.so /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so
